text:
C_MDCR_RUG_VRSN_TXT Recalculated Z0100B CHAR 10 The data in this column contains the calculated Medicare Part A RUG version code.
16 C_MDCR_STAY_CD C_MDCR_STAY_CD Recalculated Z0100C CHAR 1 The data in this column is an output value that is produced by the grouper and indicates whether the short-stay logic was used to calculate the RUG. discontinued 09/30/2023
17 C_MDCR_SET_CD C_MDCR_SET_CD CMI Set for Recalculated Z0100A CHAR 3 The data in this column contains the calculated Medicare Set Code
